name: Dream AI — Post-Purchase Review Request Sequence
description: Two-step email sequence to request Google reviews after digital product purchase. Day 5: warm check-in + review ask. Day 10: shorter follow-up with 20% discount incentive.

productName.description: Name of the purchased digital product

reviewLink.description: Direct Google review link for the business

discountCode.description: 20% discount code for the incentive in Day 10 email

sequence.name: Day 5 — Warm Review Request
sequence.subject: How's {{productName}} working out, {{firstName}}?
sequence.previewText: Hope {{productName}} is making a difference for you, {{firstName}}! Mind leaving us a quick review?
sequence.purpose: Warm check-in after 5 days. Ask about product experience, offer support, and request a Google review.

sequence.name: Day 10 — Follow-Up with Incentive
sequence.subject: Quick favor — 30 seconds
sequence.previewText: {{firstName}}, one quick review would mean the world to us — plus 20% off your next product.
sequence.purpose: Shorter, more direct follow-up. Emphasize small-business impact, offer 20% discount incentive for proof of review.

incentive.instruction: Reply to this email with a screenshot of your review to receive the code.

workflowNotes: Add a 'Wait' node for 5 days after purchase trigger
Use merge tags as n8n expression variables: {{ $json.firstName }}, etc.
Before Day 10 email, add an IF node checking if review-day-5 was opened/clicked
Add a CRM update node to flag 'review_submitted' and skip remaining sequence
Inbound reply with screenshot → manual or AI-based verification → send discount code
